### Friday, May 08, 2026 - Testing B

**Warmup:**
- [ ] Only need to perform the following tests ONCE per training block

**A1) Max Push Up TEST**
| Set | Weight | Reps | Notes |
|-----|--------|------|-------|
| 1   |        |      |  |
| 2   |        |      |  |
| 3   |        |      |  |
*a) Perform 1x MAX reps until technical failure*
*b) Member does not allow their hips/abdomen to fall towards the floor*
*c) Member's chest must touch the bulgarian bag and arms must come to complete lockout at the top of the movement * The set will be ended when failure to maintain proper technique becomes apparent, at the discretion of the coach*

**A2) Max Pull TEST TRX Row to Pullup 1x20 or 1x MAX reps until technical failure**
| Set | Weight | Reps | Notes |
|-----|--------|------|-------|
| 1   |        |      |  |
*a) Member extends their arms fully at the bottom and pulls their chest to the handles/bars at the top of the movement*
*b) Member does not kip, swing, or flail during execution * The set will be ended when failure to maintain proper technique becomes apparent, at the discretion of the coach*

**F) Regeneration Choose (1-2) modalities and execute for 10:00-20:00 at the end of the session: - IR Sauna - Cold Plunge - Contrast Protocol (see coach) - Mobility Flow (see coach) - Meditation (see coach) - Therabody Leggings - Targeted Static Stretching (see coach) - Put down the phone - Nap or sit still and quiet - Go outside in the sunshine Download for guided meditations: https://insighttimer.com/**
| Set | Weight | Reps | Notes |
|-----|--------|------|-------|
| 1   |        |      |  |
| 2   |        |      |  |

### Tuesday, May 19, 2026 - Testing B

**Warmup:**
- [ ] Only need to perform the following tests ONCE per training block

**A1) Max Push Up TEST**
| Set | Weight | Reps | Notes |
|-----|--------|------|-------|
| 1   |        |      |  |
| 2   |        |      |  |
| 3   |        |      |  |
*a) Perform 1x MAX reps until technical failure*
*b) Member does not allow their hips/abdomen to fall towards the floor*
*c) Member's chest must touch the bulgarian bag and arms must come to complete lockout at the top of the movement * The set will be ended when failure to maintain proper technique becomes apparent, at the discretion of the coach*

**A2) Max Pull TEST TRX Row to Pullup 1x20 or 1x MAX reps until technical failure**
| Set | Weight | Reps | Notes |
|-----|--------|------|-------|
| 1   |        |      |  |
*a) Member extends their arms fully at the bottom and pulls their chest to the handles/bars at the top of the movement*
*b) Member does not kip, swing, or flail during execution * The set will be ended when failure to maintain proper technique becomes apparent, at the discretion of the coach*

### Tuesday, August 04, 2026 - Watt's a challenge?

**Warmup:**
- [ ] CARs Routine: 3x each Neck Scap Shoulders Elbow Wrists T/S Spine Hip Knee Ankle Toes

**A1) Cardiac Output (Q) 2x2min**
| Set | Weight | Reps | Notes |
|-----|--------|------|-------|
| 1   |        |      |  |
| 2   |        |      |  |

**A2) Plank 5s Inhale 5s Hold 5s Exhale 5s Hold 2x 2 rounds**
| Set | Weight | Reps | Notes |
|-----|--------|------|-------|
| 1   |        |      |  |
| 2   |        |      |  |

**B) Watt's a challenge? Begin the challenge by maintaining a pace that produces Watts equal to 50% of the body weight (LBs) of the member. After the first minute increase the wattage by 15 Watts. For each minute after that, continue increasing the wattage by 15 Watts until they are unable to maintain the pace. Record the total time and corresponding wattages. Rest 3 minutes between each machine. The goal is the highest cumulative time between all 4 machines. ***If the total time is less than 30 minutes, repeat the machine with the lowest time*** Example: 200lb member 0:00-1:00 Maintain 100W 1:00-2:00 Maintain 115W 2:00-3:00 Maintain 130W Continue building until member is unable to maintain minimum W output.**
| Set | Weight | Reps | Notes |
|-----|--------|------|-------|
| 1   |        |      |  |
| 2   |        |      |  |
| 3   |        |      |  |

**C) Echo Bike Begin the challenge by maintaining a pace that produces Watts equal to 50% of the body weight (LBs) of the member. After the first minute increase the wattage by 15. For each minute after that continue increasing the wattage by 15W / min until they are unable to maintain the pace. Record the total time and corresponding wattages. Rest 3 minutes between each machine. The goal is the highest cumulative time between all 4 machines.**
| Set | Weight | Reps | Notes |
|-----|--------|------|-------|
| 1   |        |      |  |
| 2   |        |      |  |
| 3   |        |      |  |

**D) Ski Erg Begin the challenge by maintaining a pace that produces Watts equal to 50% of the body weight (LBs) of the member. After the first minute increase the wattage by 15. For each minute after that continue increasing the wattage by 15W / min until they are unable to maintain the pace. Record the total time and corresponding wattages. Rest 3 minutes between each machine. The goal is the highest cumulative time between all 4 machines.**
| Set | Weight | Reps | Notes |
|-----|--------|------|-------|
| 1   |        |      |  |
| 2   |        |      |  |
| 3   |        |      |  |

**E) Rower Begin the challenge by maintaining a pace that produces Watts equal to 50% of the body weight (LBs) of the member. After the first minute increase the wattage by 15. For each minute after that continue increasing the wattage by 15W / min until they are unable to maintain the pace. Record the total time and corresponding wattages. Rest 3 minutes between each machine. The goal is the highest cumulative time between all 4 machines.**
| Set | Weight | Reps | Notes |
|-----|--------|------|-------|
| 1   |        |      |  |
| 2   |        |      |  |
| 3   |        |      |  |

**F) Watt Bike Begin the challenge by maintaining a pace that produces Watts equal to 50% of the body weight (LBs) of the member. After the first minute increase the wattage by 15. For each minute after that continue increasing the wattage by 15W / min until they are unable to maintain the pace. Record the total time and corresponding wattages. ### Tuesday, August 18, 2026 - Watt's a challenge?

**Warmup:**
- [ ] CARs Routine: 3x each Neck Scap Shoulders Elbow Wrists T/S Spine Hip Knee Ankle Toes

**A1) Cardiac Output (Q) 2x2min**
| Set | Weight | Reps | Notes |
|-----|--------|------|-------|
| 1   |        |      |  |
| 2   |        |      |  |

**A2) Plank 5s Inhale 5s Hold 5s Exhale 5s Hold 2x 2 rounds**
| Set | Weight | Reps | Notes |
|-----|--------|------|-------|
| 1   |        |      |  |
| 2   |        |      |  |

**B) Watt's a challenge? Begin the challenge by maintaining a pace that produces Watts equal to 50% of the body weight (LBs) of the member. After the first minute increase the wattage by 15 Watts. For each minute after that, continue increasing the wattage by 15 Watts until they are unable to maintain the pace. Record the total time and corresponding wattages. Rest 3 minutes between each machine. The goal is the highest cumulative time between all 4 machines. ***If the total time is less than 30 minutes, repeat the machine with the lowest time*** Example: 200lb member 0:00-1:00 Maintain 100W 1:00-2:00 Maintain 115W 2:00-3:00 Maintain 130W Continue building until member is unable to maintain minimum W output.**
| Set | Weight | Reps | Notes |
|-----|--------|------|-------|
| 1   |        |      |  |
| 2   |        |      |  |
| 3   |        |      |  |

**C) Echo Bike Begin the challenge by maintaining a pace that produces Watts equal to 50% of the body weight (LBs) of the member. After the first minute increase the wattage by 15. For each minute after that continue increasing the wattage by 15W / min until they are unable to maintain the pace. Record the total time and corresponding wattages. Rest 3 minutes between each machine. The goal is the highest cumulative time between all 4 machines.**
| Set | Weight | Reps | Notes |
|-----|--------|------|-------|
| 1   |        |      |  |
| 2   |        |      |  |
| 3   |        |      |  |

**D) Ski Erg Begin the challenge by maintaining a pace that produces Watts equal to 50% of the body weight (LBs) of the member. After the first minute increase the wattage by 15. For each minute after that continue increasing the wattage by 15W / min until they are unable to maintain the pace. Record the total time and corresponding wattages. Rest 3 minutes between each machine. The goal is the highest cumulative time between all 4 machines.**
| Set | Weight | Reps | Notes |
|-----|--------|------|-------|
| 1   |        |      |  |
| 2   |        |      |  |
| 3   |        |      |  |

**E) Rower Begin the challenge by maintaining a pace that produces Watts equal to 50% of the body weight (LBs) of the member. After the first minute increase the wattage by 15. For each minute after that continue increasing the wattage by 15W / min until they are unable to maintain the pace. Record the total time and corresponding wattages. Rest 3 minutes between each machine. The goal is the highest cumulative time between all 4 machines.**
| Set | Weight | Reps | Notes |
|-----|--------|------|-------|
| 1   |        |      |  |
| 2   |        |      |  |
| 3   |        |      |  |

**F) Watt Bike Begin the challenge by maintaining a pace that produces Watts equal to 50% of the body weight (LBs) of the member. After the first minute increase the wattage by 15. For each minute after that continue increasing the wattage by 15W / min until they are unable to maintain the pace. Record the total time and corresponding wattages. Rest 3 minutes between each machine. The goal is the highest cumulative time between all 4 machines.**
| Set | Weight | Reps | Notes |
|-----|--------|------|-------|
| 1   |        |      |  |
| 2   |        |      |  |
| 3   |        |      |  |

**G) Targeted Mobility Choose (1-2) of the following: - Full body CARs x3e - Hip IR PAILs/RAILs 2x :10e @ 20-30% - Hip ER PAILs/RAILs 2x :10e @ 20-30% - Shoulder ER PAILs/RAILs 2x :10e @ 20-30% - Shoulder IR PAILs/RAILs 2x :10e @ 20-30%**
| Set | Weight | Reps | Notes |
|-----|--------|------|-------|

### Tuesday, August 25, 2026 - Watt's a challenge?

**Warmup:**
- [ ] CARs Routine: 3x each Neck Scap Shoulders Elbow Wrists T/S Spine Hip Knee Ankle Toes

| Set | Weight | Reps | Notes |

| Set | Weight | Reps | Notes |
|-----|--------|------|-------|
| 1   |        |      |  |
| 2   |        |      |  |

**B) Watt's a challenge? Begin the challenge by maintaining a pace that produces Watts equal to 50% of the body weight (LBs) of the member. After the first minute increase the wattage by 15 Watts. For each minute after that, continue increasing the wattage by 15 Watts until they are unable to maintain the pace. Record the total time and corresponding wattages. Rest 3 minutes between each machine. The goal is the highest cumulative time between all 4 machines. ***If the total time is less than 30 minutes, repeat the machine with the lowest time*** Example: 200lb member 0:00-1:00 Maintain 100W 1:00-2:00 Maintain 115W 2:00-3:00 Maintain 130W Continue building until member is unable to maintain minimum W output.**
| Set | Weight | Reps | Notes |
|-----|--------|------|-------|
| 1   |        |      |  |
| 2   |        |      |  |
| 3   |        |      |  |

**C) Echo Bike Begin the challenge by maintaining a pace that produces Watts equal to 50% of the body weight (LBs) of the member. After the first minute increase the wattage by 15. For each minute after that continue increasing the wattage by 15W / min until they are unable to maintain the pace. Record the total time and corresponding wattages. Rest 3 minutes between each machine. The goal is the highest cumulative time between all 4 machines.**
| Set | Weight | Reps | Notes |
|-----|--------|------|-------|
| 1   |        |      |  |
| 2   |        |      |  |
| 3   |        |      |  |

**D) Ski Erg Begin the challenge by maintaining a pace that produces Watts equal to 50% of the body weight (LBs) of the member. After the first minute increase the wattage by 15. For each minute after that continue increasing the wattage by 15W / min until they are unable to maintain the pace. Record the total time and corresponding wattages. | 2   |        |      |  |

**B) Need For Speed For each machine, the member will attempt to achieve the highest possible wattage in a single attempt, regardless of the time it takes for the wattage to peak. Once the wattage has peaked and begins to fall, that round is complete. Rest 60s then repeat. 5 rounds per machine machine, in no particular order. Record the peak wattage for each round. Complete on 3-5 machines.**

**C) VALD CMJ TEST 3-5 x MAX**

|-----|--------|------|-------|
| 1   |        |      |  |
| 2   |        |      |  |
| 3   |        |      |  |

| 1   |        |      |  |
